display.purpose: Landing and major page headlines only.

headline.purpose: Section headers and major subpage headings.

title.purpose: Card titles, comparison rows, and category labels.

body.purpose: Guidance, decisions, descriptions, and source-backed explanation.

label.purpose: Controls, metadata, status pills, counts, and compact UI labels.

shadows.name: hairline-header
shadows.purpose: Sticky header separation without a boxed card feel.

shadows.name: hover-card
shadows.purpose: Light raised state on card hover.

motion.name: state-standard
motion.purpose: Panel and selected-state transitions when needed.

components.name: Primary Button
components.description: Primary command button for opening the lab, comparisons, or high-confidence actions.
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { min-height: 42px; border: 0; border-radius: 999px; background: var(--accent, #0b6b5f); color: #fff; cursor: pointer; font: inherit; font-weight: 820; padding: 10px 14px; text-decoration: none; transition: background 150ms ease-out, color 150ms ease-out; } .ds-btn-primary:hover { background: var(--accent-strong, #073d37); } .ds-btn-primary:focus-visible { outline: 3px solid var(--focus, #1f66d1); outline-offset: 2px; }

components.name: Secondary Button
components.description: Secondary command button for alternate paths that should not compete with the primary action.
components.css: .ds-btn-secondary { min-height: 42px; border: 0; border-radius: 999px; background: #f0f3f2; color: var(--accent-strong, #073d37); cursor: pointer; font: inherit; font-weight: 820; padding: 10px 14px; text-decoration: none; transition: background 150ms ease-out, color 150ms ease-out; } .ds-btn-secondary:hover { background: var(--accent-soft, #e7f4f1); color: var(--accent-strong, #073d37); } .ds-btn-secondary:focus-visible { outline: 3px solid var(--focus, #1f66d1); outline-offset: 2px; }

components.name: Search Field
components.description: Large catalog search field for pattern discovery.
components.css: .ds-search { display: grid; gap: 8px; color: var(--accent-strong, #073d37); font: 800 0.82rem/1.2 Inter, system-ui, sans-serif; } .ds-search input { min-height: 48px; border: 1px solid var(--line-strong, #b9c4be); border-radius: 8px; background: #fff; color: var(--text, #17191c); font: 400 1rem/1.4 Inter, system-ui, sans-serif; padding: 0 14px; } .ds-search input:hover { box-shadow: inset 0 0 0 1px rgba(11, 107, 95, 0.22); } .ds-search input:focus-visible { outline: 3px solid var(--focus, #1f66d1); outline-offset: 2px; }

components.name: Status Chip
components.description: Compact metadata chip for category, maturity, status, and verification details.
components.css: .ds-chip { display: inline-flex; width: fit-content; align-items: center; border: 0; border-radius: 999px; background: var(--accent-soft, #e7f4f1); color: var(--accent-strong, #073d37); font: 820 0.72rem/1 Inter, system-ui, sans-serif; padding: 5px 8px; }

components.name: Catalog Card
components.description: Reusable framed object card for pattern indexes and repeated catalog items.
components.html:
Inline validation

Show validation near the field when users can recover in place.

Input And Data Entry
components.css: .ds-card { display: grid; gap: 12px; min-height: 180px; border: 1px solid #dfe7e3; border-radius: 8px; background: #fff; color: var(--text, #17191c); padding: 18px; box-shadow: 0 1px 3px rgba(23, 25, 28, 0.04); } .ds-card:hover { border-color: #c8d7d1; box-shadow: 0 8px 22px rgba(23, 25, 28, 0.07); } .ds-card h3 { margin: 0; font: 820 1.02rem/1.25 Inter, system-ui, sans-serif; } .ds-card p { margin: 0; color: var(--muted, #5f6770); font: 400 0.9rem/1.48 Inter, system-ui, sans-serif; } .ds-card span { width: fit-content; border-radius: 999px; background: rgba(23, 25, 28, 0.055); color: var(--accent-strong, #073d37); font: 820 0.72rem/1 Inter, system-ui, sans-serif; padding: 4px 7px; }

components.name: Comparison Row
components.description: Dense, readable row for comparison libraries where a card grid would become clutter.
components.html: Back link vs Breadcrumbs vs PaginationPrefer a Back link when the page is part of a multi-page transaction and users need to return to the previous service page.3 patterns
components.css: .ds-comparison-row { display: grid; gap: 8px; border-bottom: 1px solid var(--line, #d7ddd9); color: var(--text, #17191c); padding: 18px 6px 18px 0; text-decoration: none; } .ds-comparison-row:hover { background: linear-gradient(90deg, rgba(225, 244, 239, 0.72), transparent 72%); } .ds-comparison-row strong { max-width: 780px; color: #17211f; font: 820 1rem/1.3 Inter, system-ui, sans-serif; } .ds-comparison-row span { max-width: 880px; color: var(--muted, #5f6770); font: 650 0.92rem/1.48 Inter, system-ui, sans-serif; } .ds-comparison-row em { width: fit-content; border-radius: 999px; background: #eef5f2; color: #244f48; font: normal 820 0.7rem/1 Inter, system-ui, sans-serif; padding: 5px 8px; }

components.name: Primary Navigation
components.description: Sticky product navigation with pill active states and wrapping mobile behavior.
components.html: HomeCompareSources
components.css: .ds-nav { display: flex; flex-wrap: wrap; gap: 6px; align-items: center; } .ds-nav a { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; border-radius: 999px; color: var(--muted, #5f6770); font: 650 0.9rem/1 Inter, system-ui, sans-serif; padding: 8px 10px; text-decoration: none; } .ds-nav a:hover, .ds-nav a.is-current { background: var(--accent-soft, #e7f4f1); color: var(--accent-strong, #073d37); } .ds-nav a:focus-visible { outline: 3px solid var(--focus, #1f66d1); outline-offset: 2px; }

narrative.overview: The interface is a restrained product workbench for source-backed UI decisions. It should feel like a clear desk with well-labeled tools: quiet enough for repeated use, structured enough for comparison, and confident enough to teach by example. The dominant rhythm is list-first and task-first; the catalog is calm reading and navigation while the lab is a denser decision workspace.
keyCharacteristics: Restrained teal accent on cool neutral surfaces.
Inter/system typography with high weight contrast but no decorative font changes.
8px frames for real cards and fields; pill shapes only for nav, chips, and compact controls.
Tonal layering, hairline separators, and occasional light shadows instead of heavy boxes.
Dense enough for expert work, but never wall-of-text dense.

rules.name: The <=10% Accent Rule
rules.body: Teal is for active decisions, primary actions, links, and current state. If teal becomes decorative wallpaper, the page stops feeling like a tool.

rules.name: The Evidence First Rule
rules.body: Neutrals must preserve readable contrast. Muted text is allowed for metadata, not for essential instructions or decision rules.

rules.name: The One Typeface Rule
rules.body: This is a product interface; do not introduce a display font or decorative pairing unless the whole brand system is intentionally revised.

rules.name: The Flat Until Needed Rule
rules.body: Surfaces are flat at rest. Use a shadow when it explains hover, overlay, sticky, or media elevation; do not pair every border with a large soft shadow.

dos: Do use the restrained teal palette for decisions, selection, and primary actions only.
Do keep catalog pages readable before they are exhaustive: headings, rows, and metadata should create a clear scan path.
Do use 8px cards and fields, pill chips and nav, and hairline separators for dense lists.
Do preserve keyboard focus with the 3px Focus Blue outline.
Do keep the lab and catalog distinct: readable browsing for catalog pages, denser controls for the lab.
Do use source-backed copy that is direct, practical, and approachable.
donts: Don't create cluttered, claustrophobic, scary, content-vomit pages.
Don't use generic AI/SaaS template aesthetics, gradient hero scaffolds, glassmorphism, or decorative trend surfaces.
Don't claim UX leadership while making the catalog difficult to scan, compare, or trust.
Don't use cards for every row. Rows, separators, and grouped sections are often the better product pattern.
Don't use border-left or border-right greater than 1px as colored accents on cards, list items, callouts, or alerts.
Don't use negative heading letter spacing, decorative font pairings, or display fonts inside UI labels.
Don't pair a 1px border with a wide decorative shadow on every card or button.
Don't exceed 16px card radius. Reserve full pills for chips, nav, and compact controls.
